ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer(s) */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer(s) */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the composer */,
  "bond_actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor who played Bond */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the film */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office earnings */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the film's promotional image */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the film */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("composer_id") REFERENCES composers ("composer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_bond_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Director's date of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Producer's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Producer's date of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Writer's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Writer's date of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "composers" (
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composer */,
  "composer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the composer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the composer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Composer's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Composer's date of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the composer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Actor's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Actor's date of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the film */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office earnings */,
  "domestic_box_office" REAL /* Domestic box office earnings */,
  "international_box_office" REAL /* International box office earnings */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for marketing */,
  "profit" REAL /* Calculated profit (box office - budget - marketing budget) */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (profit / budget) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "is_promotional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the image is promotional */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., poster, still, behind-the-scenes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
